description: Practice tying belt correctly and neatly
Read the student oath and stand still

task: Planks - 30 seconds. No time limit. Count to yourself
Horse Riding Stance - Inner forearm block
Round house kick - FRONT LEG (moving forward)
Round house kick - BACK LEG (moving forward)

description: Do the kata 3 times. Your goal is to get to 19 steps - follow the count and stay together
Sit down criss cross and wait for others to finish their katas
wear your gloves. Practice kicks and punch with partner
Practice 1-step sparring. Your goal is good stances fast techniques and loud ki-ap. Practice each technique 5 times
close your eyes(optional). sit on knees do not move
Remember to stand in the student oath stanch
